title: Forgeblade 32x / Tools
description: This resource pack is perfect for those who want to freshen up their gaming experience while staying true to the original Minecraft style.
body:
![Sample items in the game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ppvZBiOo/images/3c2f101b4d41216c1bd523d3122d0d0d72820e2d.png)

The Forgeblade Pack is an update to Minecraft's standard textures, giving the game a new level of detail and style. The pack includes reworked textures for _**tools, swords and bows**_, adding bright metallic accents. This resource pack is perfect for those who want to freshen up their gaming experience while staying true to the original Minecraft style.
